author: orionriver@gmail.com
text:
§5 commit-message trailer protocol

src/message.rs builds and parses the subject/body/trailer-block commit shape via git interpret-trailers (no hand-rolled parser). Core writes bl-protocol/bl-op/bl-actor always and bl-id on per-task ops; plugin-prefixed body trailers are preserved and parsed into Metadata with repeated keys grouped into a list. Subject defaults to the ball title.
